Contents 
  1. Description
  2. Nested Class Summary

Interface ListAttribute<X,E>

Type Parameters:
X - The type the represented List belongs to
E - The element type of the represented List
All Superinterfaces:
Attribute<X,List<E>>, Bindable<E>, PluralAttribute<X,List<E>,E>
public interface ListAttribute<X,E> extends PluralAttribute<X,List<E>,E>
Instances of the type ListAttribute represent persistent List-valued attributes.
Since:
2.0
